final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: interior-design-mockup
Asset type: editorial interior photography, lifestyle magazine spread
Primary request: minimalist Scandinavian living room with soft natural light and cozy atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: white painted walls, light oak wood flooring, large floor-to-ceiling window with soft daylight streaming in
Subject: gray fabric sofa as focal point, potted green plant beside it, modern floor lamp with clean lines
Style/medium: interior photography, Scandinavian minimalism, hygge aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide shot, balanced composition, eye-level perspective
Lighting/mood: soft diffused sunlight through large window, warm and inviting, clean and bright
Color palette: white walls + light oak wood + gray sofa + green plant + warm natural sunlight
Materials/textures: matte painted walls, smooth oak floor grain, soft woven fabric upholstery, matte metal lamp finish, natural plant leaves
Constraints: maintain minimalist aesthetic with no clutter, keep the warm sunlight as key element
Avoid: cluttered objects, dark shadows, artificial lighting, busy patterns, watermark
